title: I can have sex to my heart's content with my favourite person
description: Satoru and his mother crossed a line in their relationship some time last year when hubby was away. Now that he's gone out of town on business, the two of them have a whole day to explore those feelings. Mommy's got a surefire idea to really get Satoru in the mood, though she may not be fully prepared for how well it works!
author: Higefurai
